description: CNY Coin (CNYC) is the world’s FIRST lawful stablecoin for the fiat Chinese Yuan (CNY), launched on AtlantisChain — the world’s ONLY ultra-super-fast Layer-0 blockchain with 3,600,000 TPS and 0.031-second block time, over 100,000× faster and 10,000× cheaper than Ethereum. Built for cross-border payments through the 22nd Century, CNYC maintains a fixed total supply and stable value supported by CNY (RMB), USD, and USD stablecoins, enabling instant payments and ultra-low-cost trading globally.
name: CNY Coin
